title: CULPITT Sparkle Number Candles For Cake & Cupcakes, Single Numbers From 0-9, Say Happy Birthday with These Candle Sparklers, Celebrate Birthdays & Anniversaries with Flair - Gold 8
features: Sparkle Candles For Cake - Even plain cakes will be extra special with these birthday candles sparklers that come in bright individual numbers. Come in blue, gold, pink
Specific Birthday Candles Numbers - Celebrate birthdays with these twinkling number candles, that come in numerals 0-9
Reusable - These fun sparkle number Happy Birthday candles from Culpitt are sturdy enough to use every year. Simply mix and match to get the number that corresponds to the birthday year

Food Safe Cake Candles - Culpitt candles are safe to use on cakes, cupcakes, and all your baked goods and desserts for birthdays, anniversaries or other special occasions. The attached plastic pick holds them upright and in place
Candles From A Leader In Cake Decorating - Culpitt is one of the leading baking suppliers in the UK and stocks all the ingredients, tools and cutters you need to create beautiful cakes
description: Product Description Call attention to a birthday or anniversary with these colourful Sparkle Number Candles from Culpitt. Create eye-catching cakes with these sparkling candles that come in blue, pink, and gold. Choose individual numbers 0-9. The attached plastic pick on each candle ensures that it stays in place and is easy to remove. You can trust you’re getting high-quality candles when you purchase from Culpitt, a leader in baking supplies in the UK Safety Warning Handle with care.
